methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $44M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Housing & Construction (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 1 same-sector peers exist in Housing & Construction, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Cobod
private.rationale: Same sector (Housing & Construction), same stage (Series A)

private.name: Material Evolution
private.rationale: Same sector (Housing & Construction), same stage (Series A)

data.narrative:
Inversion Space is a Series A-stage company in Housing & Construction founded by Justin Fiaschetti and Austin Briggs. The company has raised $44M to date. The Housing & Construction sector contains three identified private peers (ICON, Cobod, Material Evolution) and no public comparables. A narrow peer-median approach proved inapplicable due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage peers meeting valuation-tier filters within the sector.

Valuation analysis relies on stage-progression methodology, which applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A to subsequent-stage transitions. Using the $44M total raised as a proxy baseline, this method implies a $88M valuation. A triangulated range incorporating sensitivity analysis around this single applicable method yields a low of $75M, a median of $88M, and a high of $101M.

The analysis is constrained by a limited comparable set and reliance on a single methodological input. Key uncertainties include the appropriateness of the 2.0x multiplier for this particular sector and stage transition, and the absence of direct peer revenue or margin data to validate the implied valuation against operational metrics. Additional data on Housing & Construction peer financials or a broader comparable universe would strengthen conviction in this range.
